prestazioni: Engine: Toyota 2ZZ-GE (1.8L supercharged I4) with forged internals including JE Pistons 87.5mm forged slugs (9.0:1 CR) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods, paired with a Harrop TVS1320 supercharger (12psi boost) and custom Lotus Motorsport intercooler core (40% larger than OEM).

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD with 3.94:1 final drive ratio, paired with a Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch (7.25" diameter) and a custom 6-speed Lotus close-ratio gearbox with strengthened synchros (Lotus Motorsport spec).

Suspension: Öhlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers with custom Lotus-specific valving, Eibach ERS 1000N/mm front and 1200N/mm rear springs, and spherical bearing conversion for all suspension arms (SuperPro bushings).
estetica: Aero: Full Lotus Motorsport V6 Cup aero kit (carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and adjustable rear wing with Gurney flap), paired with a Vortex Generator set (Lotus Exige Cup 250 spec) for improved high-speed stability.

Body: Carbon fiber widebody conversion (RML Group Exige GT3 kit) with custom front fender vents (functional heat extraction for brakes) and a carbon fiber hardtop with integrated NACA duct (for engine bay cooling).

Interior: Sparco Pro 2000 carbon fiber seats (8.5kg each) with 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses, custom Lotus Motorsport roll cage (T45 steel, FIA-spec), and a MOTEC C127 dash logger with integrated traction control and launch control.
